testcase.name: http_availability [https://brugge-ldes.geomobility.eu/observations]
testcase.system-out: response_time_s: 0.648 status_code: 301 redirects_to: https://brugge-ldes.geomobility.eu/observations OK: HTTP endpoint reachable (redirects to HTTPS)

testcase.name: https_availability [https://brugge-ldes.geomobility.eu/observations]
testcase.failure: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='brugge-ldes.geomobility.eu', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /observations (Caused by SSLError(SSLCertVerificationError(1, '[SSL: CERTIFICATE_VERIFY_FAILED] certificate verify failed: certificate has expired (_ssl.c:1016)')))
testcase.system-err: Checking HTTPS availability for: https://brugge-ldes.geomobility.eu/observations Timeout: 10s, Max redirects: 3, Verify SSL: True Availability check failed: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='brugge-ldes.geomobility.eu', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /observations (Caused by SSLError(SSLCertVerificationError(1, '[SSL: CERTIFICATE_VERIFY_FAILED] certificate verify failed: certificate has expired (_ssl.c:1016)')))

testcase.name: http_availability [https://ldes.telraam-api.net/locations]
testcase.system-out: response_time_s: 0.281 status_code: 301 redirects_to: https://ldes.telraam-api.net/locations OK: HTTP endpoint reachable (redirects to HTTPS)

testcase.name: https_availability [https://ldes.telraam-api.net/locations]
testcase.system-out: response_time_s: 0.416 status_code: 200 OK: HTTPS available, status 200 in 0.416s
